tool.name: el_gato
tool.description: In silico SBT for Legionella pneumophila
tool.command: ## Run el_gato on each assembly #for $asm in $assembly: base='${asm.element_identifier}' && base=\${base%.fasta} && el_gato.py --assembly '${asm}' --out "output_\${base}" && sed -i "s/^>/>\${base}_/" "output_\${base}/identified_alleles.fna" && #end for ## Concatenate all outputs cat output_*/identified_alleles.fna > all_alleles.fna && ## Split by gene name (update gene list as needed) for gene in mip mompS proA pilE flaA asd neuA; do grep -A1 "_\${gene}\$" all_alleles.fna | grep -v "^--\$" > "\${gene}.fasta" || touch "\${gene}.fasta"; done

param.name: assembly
param.label: Assembled genomes
param.help: Collection of assembled bacterial genomes in FASTA format

tool.help:
**What it does**
El_gato performs in silico sequence-based typing (SBT) for *Legionella pneumophila* isolates. This tool extracts and analyzes seven key genes used in the *L. pneumophila* sequence-based typing scheme to facilitate molecular epidemiological studies and strain identification.
**Inputs**
* **Assembled genomes**: A collection of bacterial genome assemblies in FASTA format. These should be complete or draft genome assemblies of *L. pneumophila* isolates.
**Outputs**
The tool produces seven separate FASTA files, each containing the extracted allele sequences for one of the SBT genes:
* **mip.fasta**: Macrophage infectivity potentiator gene sequences * **mompS.fasta**: Major outer membrane protein gene sequences * **proA.fasta**: Gamma-glutamyl phosphate reductase gene sequences * **pilE.fasta**: Pilin gene sequences * **flaA.fasta**: Flagellin gene sequences * **asd.fasta**: Aspartate-semialdehyde dehydrogenase gene sequences * **neuA.fasta**: N-acetylneuraminate cytidylyltransferase gene sequences
**Technical Details**
The tool processes each assembly individually using el_gato.py, then combines and organizes results by gene. Sample identifiers are preserved in sequence headers to maintain traceability from input to output.
